0000001110111001 1000000110001101 1 -> sum: 1000010101000111, cout: 0

1010111000001100 1000010010101000 1 -> sum: 0011001010110101, cout: 1

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
